message:
test(snapshots): add debug overlay snapshot tests for mermaid showcase

Add two snapshot tests: full debug overlay (all flags) and bounds-only
overlay at 120x40. Validates render_debug_overlays() output from bd-3oaig.11.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
